calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Judgment Debtor's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Judgment Debtor is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
